news.title: TCS focuses on building India's AI infrastructure through strategic initiatives.
news.summary: TCS focuses on building India's AI infrastructure through strategic initiatives.

news.title:
AI-driven productivity tools disrupt Indian IT's manpower-driven revenue model, sparking investor anxiety.
BSE IT Index fell 22% over the past year; firms like TCS, Infosys, HCL impacted.
news.summary:
AI-driven productivity tools disrupt Indian IT's manpower-driven revenue model, sparking investor anxiety.
BSE IT Index fell 22% over the past year; firms like TCS, Infosys, HCL impacted.

news.title:
TPG Terabyte acquired a 49% stake in HyperVault, a TCS subsidiary.
The transaction, worth INR 199.4 crore, was completed on March 9, 2026.
news.summary:
TPG Terabyte acquired a 49% stake in HyperVault, a TCS subsidiary.
The transaction, worth INR 199.4 crore, was completed on March 9, 2026.

news.title:
TCS opens Gemini Experience Center in Michigan to boost AI-driven manufacturing.
Partners with Google Cloud to deliver physical AI solutions for manufacturing.
news.summary:
TCS opens Gemini Experience Center in Michigan to boost AI-driven manufacturing.
Partners with Google Cloud to deliver physical AI solutions for manufacturing.

news.title:
TCS CEO K Krithivasan highlights optimism on data center plans and AI agents.
TCS focuses on expanding services and courting clients for growth.
news.summary:
TCS CEO K Krithivasan highlights optimism on data center plans and AI agents.

news.title:
Foreign investors cut exposure to IT stocks, causing steepest fall in 2 decades.
AI disruption fears and global macro risks drive sell-off in IT sector.
news.summary:
Foreign investors cut exposure to IT stocks, causing steepest fall in 2 decades.
AI disruption fears and global macro risks drive sell-off in IT sector.

news.title:
Jio Finance invests ₹147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV, with funds for operations.
TCS plans more AI data centres; Wipro appoints Laura Miller; Bajaj Auto loan repaid.
news.summary:
Jio Finance invests ₹147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV, with funds for operations.
TCS plans more AI data centres; Wipro appoints Laura Miller; Bajaj Auto loan repaid.

news.title:
TCS is in advanced talks with tech majors to expand India's AI infrastructure, addressing a projected need for 10 GW of AI data centre capacity by 2030.
TCS shares closed down 0.35% at ₹2,578.8, facing investor concerns over AI strategy amid rising competition and AI-driven disruptions.
news.summary:
TCS is in advanced talks with tech majors to expand India's AI infrastructure, addressing a projected need for 10 GW of AI data centre capacity by 2030.
TCS shares closed down 0.35% at ₹2,578.8, facing investor concerns over AI strategy amid rising competition and AI-driven disruptions.

news.title:
Kotak cuts IT stock price targets by 15-28%, maintaining long-term relevance and terminal growth assumptions.
Preferred stocks include Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Coforge, and Hexaware; highest upside potential at 39% for Coforge.
news.summary:
Kotak cuts IT stock price targets by 15-28%, maintaining long-term relevance and terminal growth assumptions.
Preferred stocks include Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Coforge, and Hexaware; highest upside potential at 39% for Coforge.

news.title:
Cognizant emphasizes superior design over cost-cutting to win AI deals, focusing on fixed-price contracts for certainty.
Infosys, TCS, and HCLTech report AI revenues; Cognizant targets AI market share growth despite automation concerns.
news.summary:
Cognizant emphasizes superior design over cost-cutting to win AI deals, focusing on fixed-price contracts for certainty.

news.title:
TCS, Infy, Cognizant, and Wipro impose travel curbs due to Gulf tensions.
IT firms activate crisis teams as airspace closures disrupt transit hubs.
news.summary:
TCS, Infy, Cognizant, and Wipro impose travel curbs due to Gulf tensions.

news.title:
TCS partners with Zscaler to launch AI-enabled Workspace Experience Studio, integrating Zero Trust security, observability, and analytics.
The initiative targets an $8B opportunity in the digital workspace market over the next five years.
news.summary:
TCS partners with Zscaler to launch AI-enabled Workspace Experience Studio, integrating Zero Trust security, observability, and analytics.
The initiative targets an $8B opportunity in the digital workspace market over the next five years.

news.title:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.
news.summary:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.

news.title:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.
news.summary:
Indian IT sector faces challenges with mid and small-cap IT stocks losing over a third of their value in six months, while Nifty IT index dropped 15%.
AI adoption may reshape the sector; Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and TCS pivot to AI strategies, but market-beating returns remain uncertain near-term.

news.title:
AI advancements, like chatbots, threaten India's outsourcing jobs sector.
TCS and Infosys may face challenges as automation reshapes the industry.
news.summary:
AI advancements, like chatbots, threaten India's outsourcing jobs sector.
TCS and Infosys may face challenges as automation reshapes the industry.

news.title:
India's IT stocks face uncertainty after a 20% crash, raising fears of obsolescence due to AI.
Unlike 2008's crisis, there is no single shock event, but ongoing concerns impact the $250B IT model.
news.summary:
India's IT stocks face uncertainty after a 20% crash, raising fears of obsolescence due to AI.
Unlike 2008's crisis, there is no single shock event, but ongoing concerns impact the $250B IT model.

news.title:
Infosys, TCS, and HCL Tech are in focus as Nvidia's Q3 results highlight strong AI demand, boosting opportunities for Indian IT firms.
Nvidia's record $68.1B revenue (+73% YoY) and $42.9B profit emphasize AI's growth, despite market caution on overvaluation risks.
news.summary:
Infosys, TCS, and HCL Tech are in focus as Nvidia's Q3 results highlight strong AI demand, boosting opportunities for Indian IT firms.
Nvidia's record $68.1B revenue (+73% YoY) and $42.9B profit emphasize AI's growth, despite market caution on overvaluation risks.

news.title:
TCS encourages employees to adopt AI, even if it affects current revenue streams.
The move comes amid IT sector concerns over AI's impact on billing and job security.
news.summary:
TCS encourages employees to adopt AI, even if it affects current revenue streams.

news.title:
TCS collaborates with GitLab to enhance software innovation via AI-driven orchestration.
The partnership emphasizes DevSecOps lifecycle and business transformation.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Sons' revenue doubled to ₹11.5L cr, profit tripled to ₹1L cr under N Chandrasekaran.
Tata Steel, Indian Hotels showed turnaround; TCS, Tata Motors faced challenges amid IT, auto sector woes.
news.summary:
Tata Sons' revenue doubled to ₹11.5L cr, profit tripled to ₹1L cr under N Chandrasekaran.
Tata Steel, Indian Hotels showed turnaround; TCS, Tata Motors faced challenges amid IT, auto sector woes.
